title: Rutinas diarias
communication_goal: Usar rutinas diarias en situaciones cotidianas.
cefr_objectives: Can use basic language related to rutinas diarias.
explanation_es: Este tema desarrolla rutinas diarias mediante práctica guiada y comunicación contextual.

lessons.title: My morning routine
lessons.objective: Describir una rutina de la mañana usando verbos frecuentes en presente simple y expresiones de tiempo básicas.

activities.prompt: I ___ up at seven o'clock.
activities.feedback_correct: Get up significa levantarse.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca el verbo que forma la expresión get up.

activities.prompt: I ___ my teeth after breakfast.
activities.feedback_correct: Brush my teeth significa cepillarme los dientes.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Elige la acción que se hace con los dientes.

activities.prompt: She ___ coffee in the morning.
activities.feedback_correct: Con she usamos drinks en presente simple.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Añade s al verbo porque el sujeto es she.

activities.prompt: at seven / get up / I
activities.feedback_correct: El orden es sujeto + verbo frasal + hora.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Empieza con I y coloca at seven al final.

activities.instruction: Une la acción con su significado.
activities.feedback_correct: Reconoces acciones básicas de la mañana.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Imagina el orden de las acciones al comenzar el día.

activities.prompt: I wake up at six thirty. I get up, take a shower, and have breakfast. I leave home at eight.
activities.question: What time does the speaker leave home?
activities.feedback_correct: La última acción ocurre at eight.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Escucha la hora después de leave home.

activities.prompt: I wake up at ___. I get up and take a shower. Then I have breakfast and leave home.
activities.feedback_correct: Tu rutina de la mañana se entiende claramente.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Practica wake up y get up como grupos de palabras.

activities.prompt: Maria gets up at seven. She makes her bed and gets dressed. Then she eats breakfast and walks to work.
activities.question: How does Maria go to work?
activities.feedback_correct: El texto dice walks to work.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca la acción antes de to work.

activities.prompt: Write eight sentences about your morning routine. Include times and sequence words such as first, then, and after that.
activities.feedback_correct: Describes tu mañana con una secuencia clara.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Revisa el orden de las acciones y la s con he/she si describes a otra persona.

activities.prompt: Tell the AI your morning routine and ask about theirs. Find two similarities and two differences.
activities.feedback_correct: Puedes hablar de tu mañana y comparar hábitos sencillos.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La IA ofrece imágenes de acciones y te ayuda a ordenar la rutina.

lessons.title: A day at work or school
lessons.objective: Describir actividades habituales de estudio o trabajo y hablar de horarios durante el día.

activities.prompt: I ___ English at nine o'clock.
activities.feedback_correct: Start class significa comenzar la clase.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca la acción relacionada con las nueve y el estudio.

activities.prompt: She ___ lunch at noon.
activities.feedback_correct: Have lunch cambia a has lunch con she.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La expresión para comer al mediodía es have lunch; con she usamos has.

activities.prompt: They ___ work at five.
activities.feedback_correct: They es plural y usa finish.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Con they no añadas s al verbo.

activities.prompt: usually / I / lunch / have / at one
activities.correct_answer: I usually have lunch at one.
activities.feedback_correct: El adverbio usually va antes del verbo principal.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Coloca I primero, usually antes de have y la hora al final.

activities.instruction: Une la expresión con su significado.
activities.feedback_correct: Reconoces acciones de una jornada habitual.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Relaciona cada expresión con el momento o acción del día.

activities.prompt: I start work at eight. I take a break at ten thirty and have lunch at one. I finish work at four thirty.
activities.question: When does the speaker have lunch?
activities.feedback_correct: El horario dice have lunch at one.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Escucha la hora después de have lunch.

activities.prompt: I start work at ___. I take a break at ___. I have lunch at ___. I finish at ___.
activities.feedback_correct: Tu horario se entiende con claridad.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Practica las horas y marca start y finish con claridad.

activities.prompt: Carlos studies in the morning. He starts class at eight, has a break at ten, and finishes at twelve. In the afternoon, he works at a café.
activities.question: When does Carlos finish class?
activities.feedback_correct: El horario indica finishes at twelve.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca la hora después de finishes.

activities.prompt: Write a ten-sentence description of your work or school day. Include start time, breaks, meals, finish time, and one evening activity.
activities.feedback_correct: Puedes explicar un día completo con horarios.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Revisa las expresiones have lunch, take a break, start y finish.

activities.prompt: You and the AI are classmates or coworkers. Exchange schedules, find a free time, and arrange a short meeting.
activities.feedback_correct: Puedes hablar de horarios y coordinar una actividad.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La IA muestra un calendario y te ayuda a reformular las horas.

lessons.title: Evening habits
lessons.objective: Hablar de hábitos de la tarde y la noche usando adverbios de frecuencia y expresiones de tiempo.

activities.prompt: After work, I ___ dinner.
activities.feedback_correct: Cook dinner es preparar la cena.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca la acción que normalmente ocurre antes de comer.

activities.prompt: I ___ watch TV before bed.
activities.feedback_correct: Usually expresa frecuencia y va antes del verbo principal.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Necesitas un adverbio de frecuencia, no un verbo auxiliar.

activities.prompt: He ___ goes to bed late.
activities.feedback_correct: Never va antes del verbo principal goes.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Con el presente simple usamos never directamente antes del verbo principal.

activities.prompt: always / reads / she / before bed
activities.feedback_correct: El adverbio va antes del verbo principal.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Empieza con She y coloca always antes de reads.

activities.instruction: Une la actividad con el momento probable.
activities.feedback_correct: Relacionas actividades con momentos del día.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Piensa cuándo ocurre normalmente cada acción.

activities.prompt: In the evening, I usually cook dinner. I sometimes read, but I never watch television late. I go to bed at eleven.
activities.question: What does the speaker never do late?
activities.feedback_correct: El audio dice I never watch television late.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Escucha la acción después de never.

activities.prompt: I usually cook dinner. I sometimes read. I never watch TV late. I go to bed at eleven.
activities.feedback_correct: Tus hábitos y frecuencia se entienden bien.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Marca usually, sometimes y never sin añadir pausas entre cada palabra.

activities.prompt: Ana usually gets home at six. She always has dinner with her family. She sometimes studies English after dinner, but she never studies after ten.
activities.question: When does Ana never study?
activities.feedback_correct: La frase final indica after ten.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca la expresión después de never studies.

activities.prompt: Write eight sentences about your afternoon and evening. Use always, usually, sometimes, and never at least once each.
activities.feedback_correct: Expresas hábitos y frecuencia con claridad.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Coloca el adverbio antes del verbo principal y después de be cuando corresponda.

activities.prompt: Discuss your evening habits with the AI. Find three habits you share and three that are different, then suggest a healthy evening plan.
activities.feedback_correct: Puedes hablar de hábitos y proponer una rutina sencilla.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La IA reformula tus frases y practica la posición de los adverbios.

lessons.title: A full day in English
lessons.objective: Describir y comparar un día completo usando secuencia, horarios, frecuencia y presente simple.

activities.prompt: Which sentence is correct?
options: I usually get up at seven.
I get usually up at seven.
Usually I get up at seven am.
activities.correct_answer: I usually get up at seven.
activities.feedback_correct: Usually va antes del verbo principal get up.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Coloca el adverbio en la posición natural del presente simple.

activities.prompt: First I wake up. ___, I take a shower.
activities.feedback_correct: Then conecta la siguiente acción de la secuencia.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Elige una palabra para continuar el orden temporal.

activities.prompt: My sister ___ to work at eight and ___ home at five.
activities.feedback_correct: Con she usamos goes y comes.
activities.feedback_incorrect: El sujeto my sister es tercera persona singular.

activities.prompt: then / I / go home / work / after / I
activities.feedback_correct: After work introduce el momento y la oración sigue con sujeto y verbo.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Coloca After work al principio y I go home después.

activities.instruction: Relaciona cada conector con su función.
activities.feedback_correct: Organizas una rutina con conectores temporales.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Piensa qué lugar ocupa cada expresión en una secuencia.

activities.instruction: Escucha el día completo y responde.
activities.prompt: First, I get up at six thirty. Then I go to work. I have lunch at noon and finish at five. After that, I go home, cook dinner, and usually read before bed.
activities.question: What does the speaker usually do before bed?
activities.feedback_correct: La última parte dice usually read before bed.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Escucha la acción que aparece después de usually.

activities.instruction: Graba el resumen de tu día.
activities.prompt: First, I ___. Then I ___. After that, I ___. Finally, I go to bed at ___.
activities.feedback_correct: Tu día tiene una secuencia clara y comprensible.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Haz pausas breves después de First, Then, After that y Finally.

activities.prompt: On weekdays, Pablo wakes up at seven. He always has breakfast, then takes the bus to work. He has lunch at one and usually finishes at six. After work, he sometimes exercises and goes to bed at eleven.
activities.question: What does Pablo sometimes do after work?
activities.feedback_correct: El texto dice he sometimes exercises after work.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca la acción después de sometimes.

activities.prompt: Write a twelve-sentence description of a weekday. Include at least six times, eight routine actions, four sequence words, and two frequency adverbs.
activities.feedback_correct: Puedes narrar un día completo con orden y detalles.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Revisa el orden temporal, la posición de los adverbios y la s con he/she.

activities.instruction: Organiza una rutina ideal con la IA.
activities.prompt: Tell the AI your current weekday routine, identify one problem, and design a better schedule together. Explain the final plan.
success_criteria: negotiates a new schedule for twelve turns
activities.feedback_correct: Puedes explicar hábitos, horarios y cambios en una conversación útil.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La IA convierte tus respuestas en un calendario y practica las frases difíciles.
